response.justification: Bogdan is a versatile, seasoned engineer with 15+ years across web, backend, and embedded systems, genuine high-throughput experience at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic, and current AI-tooling work at Naver. However, this is a Principal (IC6) role centered on experimentation and growth systems, and the resume shows no experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing, feature flagging, telemetry/metrics infrastructure, or statistical analysis — the core of both the required and preferred qualifications. His track record also reads as strong senior-level IC work rather than principal-level, multi-team architectural leadership, making the fit too weak for this particular role.
strengths: 15+ years of polyglot engineering experience (TypeScript, Java, C/C++, C#, D) with a strong testing and craftsmanship culture
Real scale experience: low-latency microservices handling millions of HTTP requests per second at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
Recent hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP developer tooling work at Naver, matching the AI-first emphasis
concerns: No experimentation, A/B testing, feature-flagging, or growth-measurement platform experience anywhere in the resume
No demonstrated depth in metrics/telemetry infrastructure or statistical analysis, a required qualification
Career history shows senior-level project scope with frequent moves; little evidence of principal-level, cross-team architectural ownership

key_factors.factor: Strong general engineering breadth with scale and AI tooling
